liveflow_analysis.state_read: Cleveland has entered control state. DET comeback probability collapsed; total equity remains strong because pregame over is deeply ahead of required pace.
liveflow_analysis.pace_read: Q3 maintained scoring at roughly 56-point pace despite blowout risk. Live market inflated to 223.5, validating earlier 205.5 entry.
liveflow_analysis.det_team_total_101_5: DET has 73 with 12:38 remaining from screenshot clock context. Needs 29 points. At +128, probability is around 42-45%, not enough for fresh entry due to garbage-time uncertainty.
liveflow_analysis.live_total_223_5: Over 223.5 requires roughly 54 more points from 170 with just over a quarter left. Model rates this near 49-51%; no fresh over entry due to blowout kill-switch.
liveflow_analysis.spread_21_5: CLE -21.5 and DET +21.5 both unstable due to bench/garbage-time variance. No clean single-fire edge.

recommended_action.reason: Existing over 205.5 has high equity and fresh correlated exposure violates LiveFlow risk discipline. DET TT 101.5 at +128 is tempting but below threshold after blowout kill-switch.
recommended_action.cashout_guidance: Hold over 205.5 unless market offers near-full payout before 4Q slowdown; Tobias Harris 7+ should be held due to low stake and live 2-rebound path.
